use_cases: Display user profiles in social media or community applications
Show creator profiles on content platforms like OnlyFans or Patreon
Render team member cards on company about or careers pages
Display user cards in follower/following lists and member directories
Present user information in networking or professional platforms
ai_summary: A hover-animated profile card component featuring smooth motion effects with scale, translate, and blur transitions. Displays user avatar, verification badge, bio text, follower/following statistics, and a follow action button. Built with Framer Motion and supports reduced motion accessibility preferences. Optimized for social platforms, creator tools, and community applications requiring user profile display.
